name: Santi Clausi Spaghetti Sauci
lore:
Lore of Santi Clausi Spaghetti Sauci
                                    


Santi Clausi Spaghetti Sauci is an Italian Brainrot character created by TikTok user @ncracfbcr4x. He is a Spaggheti figure with Santa Claus shape. This brainrot might come to Steal A Brainrot soon, but the results are unknown.
Lyrics
Italian
Ho ho ho ho! Santi Clausi Spaghetti Sauci con i suo i regali su un Ferrari. Que que que era importante sapere che solo i Peperoni Mastruboni possono causare una cosa del gerene.
English (Translate)
Ho ho ho ho! Santi Clausi Spaghetti Sauci with his gifts on a Ferrari. Que que que was important to know that only Mastruboni Peppers can cause something gerene.
